'''Taki''' was a member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] strike team sent to the [[Tree/Legends|forest]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]] to destroy the [[Death Star II/Legends|second Death Star's]] [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|shield generator]]. She carried a portable comm jammer which stopped an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST]] from reporting the strike team.
